master_row.title: SM5.1 Proof of Energy Conservation in S¬≥
master_row.canonical_statement: By Gauss's theorem: $$\int_{S^3} \nabla_\mu T^{\mu 0} \sqrt{g} \, d^3x = \int_{\partial S^3} T^{\mu 0} n_\mu dS$$
master_row.canonical_equation: \int_{S^3} \nabla_\mu T^{\mu 0} \sqrt{g} \, d^3x = \int_{\partial S^3} T^{\mu 0} n_\mu dS
